alt: Stately adult secretarybird standing alert with its distinctive black head crest feathers and orange facial skin
caption: The secretarybird is an instantly recognizable, long-legged terrestrial bird of prey endemic to Africa.
acquisitionNotes: Pristine high-resolution hero shot showcasing complete body profile, crest, and vibrant orange facial bare skin. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/e/ec/Secretarybird_%28Sagittarius_serpentarius%29_%2832419559205%29.jpg
